raw.message: Show you did the homework with the new Prepare mechanic and 5 college-specific mechanics.

hook.summary: Brand logo and expansion title reveal over fantasy character art.
hook.visual_action: A stylized owl-like character in ornate armor is shown while the game logo and expansion title fade in sequentially.
hook.text_overlay: MAGIC THE GATHERING SECRETS OF STRIXHAVEN PREORDER NOW

scene_flow: Introduction of the Magic: The Gathering logo over a fantasy owl character illustration.
The expansion title 'Secrets of Strixhaven' appears in a glowing green font.
The call to action 'Preorder Now' is displayed below the title.
The final frame loops with shimmering visual effects and upbeat music.
audience_proxy: Fans of trading card games and fantasy lore, likely males 18-35.
